raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the load-bearing concept of the router's input and output, highlights where the draft drifts from it (contradiction between sections), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., contradiction in 3.1 and 3.3, cost-quality mismatch), and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty about DistilBERT parameters, MS MARCO QA eval protocol).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., contradiction, mismatched claims).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., specific sections and issues)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept of the router's input and output, highlights where the draft drifts from it (contradiction between sections), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (e.g., contradiction in 3.1 and 3.3, cost-quality mismatch), and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, the agent marks confidence and missing evidence (e.g., uncertainty about DistilBERT parameters, MS MARCO QA eval protocol).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; the agent identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., contradiction, mismatched claims).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (e.g., specific sections and issues).
